name: fantasy-writer-ide
description: A focused set of writing skills, templates, and workflows for drafting fantasy novels in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Draft, revise, and keep canon consistent.
interface.longDescription: A writing-first Codex plugin for fantasy stories: outlines, world bibles, character sheets, scene drafting, continuity checks, and line edits—organized as reusable skills and file templates.
defaultPrompt: Start a new fantasy story project structure.
Turn this premise into a 3-act outline.
Draft Scene 1 with tight POV and strong conflict.
